questions.question: What is a vector space?
options: A) A set of matrices
B) A set of numbers
C) A set of vectors
D) A set of functions
questions.explanation: A set of vectors that is closed under addition and scalar multiplication.

questions.question: Which of the following is a subspace of a vector space?
options: A) A set of only positive numbers
B) A set of only negative numbers
C) A subset of the vector space
D) A set of only integers
questions.explanation: A subset of the vector space that is also a vector space.

questions.question: What does a linear combination of vectors represent?
options: A) A linear function
B) A vector in the span
C) A set of vectors added together
D) A scalar multiplied by a vector
questions.explanation: A linear combination represents a vector that is a linear combination of the original vectors.

questions.question: What is the row space of a matrix?
options: A) The column space of the transpose
B) The set of all possible row vectors
C) The set of all possible column vectors
D) The set of all possible linear combinations of the rows
questions.explanation: The row space of a matrix is the set of all possible linear combinations of the rows.

questions.question: Which of the following vectors are linearly independent?
questions.explanation: Linearly independent vectors are not multiples of each other.
